mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client_order WHERE cl_order_status = 'REQUESTED' AND cl_order_date >= CURDATE() AND cl_order_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client_order WHERE cl_order_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND cl_order_date >= CURDATE() AND cl_order_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE status='WAITING' AND IFNULL(is_deleted,0)=0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE status='READY' AND IFNULL(is_deleted,0)=0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE status='IN_PROGRESS' AND IFNULL(is_deleted,0)=0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE status = 'COMPLETED' AND updated_at >= CURDATE() AND updated_at < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(actual_qty - defect_qty), 0) FROM production_result WHERE ended_at >= CURDATE() AND ended_at < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT co.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, c.client_name AS clientName, -- 품목 요약 (정확한 컬럼명 order_qty 사용) GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(p.product_name, '(', COALESCE(cod.order_qty, 0), ')') ORDER BY cod.order_qty DESC SEPARATOR ', ' ) AS productNames, SUM(COALESCE(cod.order_qty, 0)) AS totalQty, co.cl_order_status AS status, co.cl_order_date AS createdAt FROM client_order co JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id LEFT JOIN client_order_detail cod ON co.cl_order_id = cod.cl_order_id LEFT JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id WHERE co.cl_order_date >= CURDATE() AND co.cl_order_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND co.cl_order_status IN ('REQUESTED', 'CONFIRMED') GROUP BY co.cl_order_id, c.client_name, co.cl_order_status, co.cl_order_date ORDER BY co.cl_order_date DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT co.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, c.client_name AS clientName, '주문 품목' AS productNames, 0 AS totalQty, co.cl_order_status AS status, co.cl_order_date AS createdAt FROM client_order co JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id WHERE co.cl_order_date >= CURDATE() AND co.cl_order_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND co.cl_order_status IN ('REQUESTED', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY co.cl_order_date DESC LIMIT 10
